summary: Verify detached Ed25519 signatures over exact Release Manifest canonical bytes.
rationale: R1b1 needs one fail-closed authenticity boundary backed only by caller-injected static trust policy before later artifact attestation or installer work can consume signed manifests.
verification: uv run ruff check scripts/build_offline_macos_intel.py tests/test_build_offline_macos_intel.py tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
uv run ty check scripts/build_offline_macos_intel.py tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_build_offline_macos_intel.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
deletion_targets: Untrusted or ad hoc release-manifest signature verification paths
risks: R1b2 attestation and R1c verdict authority remain intentionally unavailable after this verifier-only slice.
Callers must provide a current policy snapshot and an explicit trusted UTC verification time.
dependency_rationale: Ed25519 verification uses the pinned cryptography 49.0.0 API and wheels instead of implementing signature primitives locally.
